description: Shared definitions for The Ptah Protocol — reusable types referenced across record schemas.

sourceType.description: Content originates as original intellectual property.

sourceTypeOriginalIP.description: Content originates as original intellectual property.

sourceTypePublicDomain.description: Content is derived from public domain source material.

sourceTypeCollaborativeCommons.description: Content is created under a collaborative commons framework.

canonicalStatusOfficial.description: Record is recognized as official canon within its world.

canonicalStatusCommunity.description: Record is community-contributed canon — valid but not originator-designated.

canonicalStatusApocryphal.description: Record exists but is not recognized as part of any canonical timeline.
